title: Stroopwafel
description: Adds the best thing the dutch have ever done: Stroopwafel
body:
very simple mod that adds the stroopwafel cookie to the game.
bit better stat than the minecraft cookie cause it is a better cookie.

![recipe for stroopwafel. 2 wheat with 1 sugar in the middle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c960735a7278cfc167d0a753e5aee5937a650abd.png)
